name: @jessepomeroy/crm-api
description: Generated Convex API types for the photographer CRM platform. Consumed by spoke sites (reflecting-pool, future clients).

scripts.build: node -e "console.warn('crm-api: build deferred to Gap 2 — src/*.ts re-exports from ../../../convex and cannot be tsc-compiled standalone. For link: consumers, Vite transpiles .ts on demand, so no dist/ is needed yet. Before first publish, wire up sync-convex + a tsc config that resolves the re-exports.')"
